name: The Desire Within
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on spells of your current alignment cast this Era.
formula: (25 * ln(1+x)^2.5)%, where x = alignment spells cast this Era

name: Forbidden Will
effect: Multiplicatively increase Faction Coin find chance based on the highest FC found this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.2 * log10(1+x)^2)%, where x = highest FC found this Reincarnation

name: Magical Circuit
effect: Multiplicatively increase Maximum Mana based on researches selected.
formula: (sum(sumOfDigits(x))^1.15)%, where x = any single selected research upgrade

name: Aura of Magic
effect: Increase Non-Unique building production based on Mana produced this Era.
formula: (0.325 * x^0.325)%, where x = Mana produced this Era

name: Spiritual Bindings
effect: Multiplicatively increase assistants based on offline time this Reincarnation. Spells cast and spell activity times also count more based on offline time.
formula: Assistants: (0.4 * x^0.6)%; Spells: (0.2 * x^0.6)%; x = offline time this Reincarnation

name: Wild Surge
effect: Multiplicatively increase production bonus from Gems based on duration of your longest spell.
formula: (0.5 * x^0.5)%, where x = longest spell duration

name: Flashy Storm
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on assistants owned.

name: Wishing Well
effect: Increase production of even-tier buildings based on assistants owned; odd-tier buildings based on Excavation depth.

name: Mana Creatures
effect: Multiplicatively increase assistants based on highest mana produced in a single game this Reincarnation.
formula: (1.8 * (0.5 * ln(1+x))^1.8)%, where x = highest mana produced in a single game this Reincarnation

name: Wishes Come True
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Limited Wish activity time this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.3 * x^0.7)%, where x = Limited Wish activity time this Reincarnation

name: Blue Powder
effect: Multiplicatively increase Mana Regeneration based on Royal Exchanges made.
formula: (0.4 * x^0.8)%, where x = Royal Exchanges made

name: Academic Prodigy
effect: Tax Collections are worth more seconds based on trophies unlocked.
